WhyKnowledgeOs.title: Education built around real clinical practice
WhyKnowledgeOs.subtitle: Every course, instructor, and resource on Bosla is built around one standard: does this make you better at treating real patients?

evidence-based.title: Evidence-based curriculum
evidence-based.description: Every course is grounded in current clinical research and guidelines, not outdated textbook theory.

clinical-skills.title: Practical clinical skills
clinical-skills.description: Learn assessment techniques, treatment protocols, and clinical reasoning you can apply in your next shift.

structured-learning.title: Structured learning paths
structured-learning.description: Progress through clearly sequenced modules built for your specialty, from foundational to advanced practice.

expert-instructors.title: Taught by practicing clinicians
expert-instructors.description: Courses are built and delivered by physiotherapists and nutrition specialists actively treating patients.

bilingual.title: Arabic & English instruction
bilingual.description: Learn in the language you think in clinically — every course is available in both Arabic and English.

modern-experience.title: A modern learning experience
modern-experience.description: Video lessons, progress tracking, and clinical resources in one focused platform — no clutter, no distractions.

LearningExperience.title: Built for focused clinical learning
LearningExperience.subtitle: No clutter, no distractions — just the video, your chapters, and your progress, all in one place.
LearningExperience.capabilityPlayer: Interactive lesson player with speed and caption controls
LearningExperience.capabilityProgress: Progress tracking that syncs across every device
LearningExperience.capabilityResources: Downloadable clinical resources, protocols, and reference guides

items.quote: The ICU Physiotherapy course changed how I approach ventilated patients. The case-based lessons matched exactly what I see on rotation, not textbook scenarios.
items.name: Ahmed Nabil, PT

items.quote: I finally found a nutrition course that treats clinical reasoning seriously instead of just listing food groups. The diabetes module alone was worth the enrollment.
items.name: Dr. Mariam Adel

items.quote: As a physiotherapy student, Bosla filled the gap between what we study in lectures and what actually happens with patients. I started my internship feeling prepared.
items.name: Nourhan Samir

items.question: Who is Bosla built for?
items.answer: Bosla is built for physiotherapy and nutrition students, interns, fresh graduates, and practicing specialists who want structured, evidence-based clinical education.

items.question: Do courses come with a certificate?
items.answer: Certificates of completion are launching soon for every course. When available, they'll be added automatically to courses you've already completed — at no extra cost.

items.question: Are courses available in Arabic and English?
items.answer: Yes. Every course on Bosla is available in both Arabic and English, so you can learn in whichever language you're most comfortable with clinically.

items.question: How long do I have access to a course?
items.answer: Lifetime access. Once you enroll, the course — including any future updates — is yours to keep, with no recurring subscription.

items.question: Do courses get updated as guidelines change?
items.answer: Yes. Clinical guidelines evolve, and so do our courses. When a course is updated to reflect new evidence or protocols, you get the update automatically.

items.question: I'm not a specialist yet — can I still take these courses?
items.answer: Absolutely. Courses are labeled by level, from foundational content for students and interns to advanced modules for practicing specialists.

Cta.title: Advance your clinical practice
Cta.subtitle: Join physiotherapists, nutrition specialists, and students building real clinical skills with Bosla.
